problem id: bb326096
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) AND NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  00111100 -> 11000011
  10011101 -> 10011001
  00010011 -> 00110001
  00010010 -> 00100001
  01000010 -> 00100100
  01001010 -> 00100100
  10111111 -> 00111011
  10100101 -> 00011010

query: 10011010
predicted answer: 00101001
